# Claude 4.7 / GPT 5.5 / DeepSeek V4 — API Stability Tracker

> Multi-provider API stability monitoring for frontier AI models. Tracks uptime, latency trends, and incident history for major LLM APIs from mainland China. Maintained by AI快站 (aifast.club).

## Core

- [README — Full stability tracker](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/Claude-4.7-GPT-5.5-API-Stability-Tracker/blob/main/README.md): Real-world API stability data for Claude Opus 4.8, Sonnet 5, GPT-5.5, DeepSeek V4, Gemini 3.1 Flash, Grok 4.5, and other frontier models. 7-node monitoring from mainland China with 5-minute polling. Historical uptime, latency trends, and outage incident records.
- [API Status Dashboard (live)](https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/): Interactive real-time dashboard for 572+ models across 16+ providers. Updated every 5 minutes.
- [AI API Proxy China Guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide): How Chinese developers can access overseas AI APIs through relay services — setup, pricing optimization, tool integration.

## Recommended Relay

- [AI快站 (aifast.club)](https://www.aifast.club): 572+ models, China direct access, OpenAI-compatible API. The relay service behind this stability monitoring data.
